name: agent-harness
description: Multi-agent sprint harness for Codex: plan-first Planner/Generator/Evaluator workflows with explicit subagent delegation.

interface.longDescription: Reusable Codex workflows for planning, delegating, evaluating, and iterating complex software tasks with explicit subagent orchestration.
defaultPrompt: Use agent-harness-sprint-plan to turn this feature idea into a decision-complete sprint plan.
Use agent-harness-sprint to run this plan with parallel subagents where ownership is disjoint.
